IslaNova Capital Holdings, Inc. Privacy Notice and DSAR Workflow (PH)
We process personal data under the Data Privacy Act of 2012 (RA 10173) for HR, payroll, tax compliance, banking operations, and capital-markets services for our Philippine issuer group.
PII collected may include employee reference IDs, corporate email aliases, role titles, office location tags, masked payroll/account tokens, and audit logs, from which identity may be apparent when combined with other data.
We do not request government ID images via chat or email; uploads are only accepted through our DPO-managed secure portal.
DSARs may be lodged via dpo@islanova.example or the Service Desk form; we verify identity through role-based checks and respond within RA 10173 and its IRR timelines.
Data may be transferred to processors at Makiling Tech Park and to our cloud subprocessor “AuroraCompute PH-2,” subject to standard contractual safeguards, encryption at rest, and access control.
Retention: HR files 5 years post-separation, tax workpapers 10 years, trading system logs 7 years, and crypto operations training materials 2 years; anonymization follows deletion where feasible.
Operational use of terms such as crypto, ESG/climate, blackout, information barrier, tipping, and commercial terms in training modules is educational and not market-sensitive.
Example: our ESG/climate glossary explains “sustainability-linked token” as a product concept without referencing any issuer timetable or pricing.
We maintain an information-barrier program separating research, markets, and advisory units; exception requests require DPO and Compliance Gate approval.
A pre-announcement green token issuance and its draft commercial terms are accessible only to staff on the insider list for MDX-PH preparatory filing, and are not to be shared until public disclosure.
Marketing campaigns mentioning crypto wallets or cyber incident tabletop drills describe generic capabilities and public, already-announced features of the IslaNova Platform.
Incident response: if a cyber incident affects personal data, we will assess notifiability under RA 10173 and inform the National Data Stewardship Council (PH) where required, alongside data subjects.
We do not sell personal data; processors include fictional entities listed at processors.islanova.example, and queries may be sent to privacy.office@islanova.example.
